name: port-to-shelf-optimizer
description: National Port-to-Shelf Optimizer - Multimodal AI coordination system

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/database && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/event-bus && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/authentication && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/vessel-tracking && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/container-tracking && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/ai-prediction && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/slot-management && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/auction && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/performance-metrics && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/ulip-integration && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/api-gateway && npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/frontend
scripts.perf:all: npm run perf:load && npm run perf:stress && npm run perf:spike && npm run perf:throughput && npm run perf:ulip
scripts.frontend:foundation: npm run build --workspace @port-to-shelf/frontend && npm run test --workspace @port-to-shelf/frontend
